17	# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
18	#
19	# Recipe Bottle Foundry Ledger - inscribe, jettison, abjure, rekon, and tally operations
20	# Director credentials for inscribe, jettison, abjure, rekon; retriever credentials for tally
21	
22	set -euo pipefail
23	
24	# Multiple inclusion detection
25	test -z "${ZRBFL_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbfl multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
26	ZRBFL_SOURCED=1
27	
28	# Source shared Foundry Core module
29	source "${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}/rbfc_FoundryCore.sh"
30	
31	######################################################################
32	# Internal Functions (zrbfl_*)
33	
34	zrbfl_kindle() {
35	  test -z "${ZRBFL_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbfl already kindled"
36	
37	  buc_log_args 'Validate Foundry Core is kindled'
38	  zrbfc_sentinel
39	
40	  buc_log_args 'Verify Director RBRA file'
41	  test -n "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE:-}" || buc_die "RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE not set"
42	  test -f "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}"   || buc_die "GCB service env file not found: ${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}"
43	
44	  buc_log_args 'RBGJI inscribe step scripts (same Tools directory)'
45	  local z_self_dir="${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}"
46	  readonly ZRBFL_RBGJI_STEPS_DIR="${z_self_dir}/rbgji"
47	  test -d "${ZRBFL_RBGJI_STEPS_DIR}"   || buc_die "RBGJI steps directory not found: ${ZRBFL_RBGJI_STEPS_DIR}"
48	
49	  buc_log_args 'Define delete operation file prefix'
50	  readonly ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfl_delete_"
51	
52	  buc_log_args 'Define reliquary inscribe operation file prefix'
53	  readonly ZRBFL_RELIQUARY_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfl_reliquary_"
54	
55	  readonly ZRBFL_KINDLED=1
56	}
57	
58	zrbfl_sentinel() {
59	  zrbfc_sentinel
60	  test "${ZRBFL_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbfl not kindled - call zrbfl_kindle first"
61	}
62	
63	######################################################################
64	# Internal Helpers (zrbfl_*)
65	
66	# Internal: Submit inscribe Cloud Build job.
67	# Single step: docker pull each upstream tool image, tag for GAR, push.
68	# Uses gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker as step image (always pullable — Google-hosted).
69	zrbfl_inscribe_submit() {
70	  zrbfl_sentinel
71	
72	  local -r z_token="${1:?Token required}"
73	  local -r z_reliquary="${2:?Reliquary datestamp required}"
74	
75	  buc_step "Constructing inscribe Cloud Build resource"
76	  local -r z_gar_host="${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}"
77	  local -r z_gar_path="${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY}"
78	  local -r z_mason_sa="projects/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/serviceAccounts/${RBGD_MASON_EMAIL}"
79	
80	  # Inscribe step image: Google-hosted docker builder (always pullable, even under NO_PUBLIC_EGRESS)
81	  local -r z_step_image="gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker"
82	
83	  # Assemble inscribe step from script
84	  local -r z_script_path="${ZRBFL_RBGJI_STEPS_DIR}/rbgji01-inscribe-mirror.sh"
85	  test -f "${z_script_path}" || buc_die "Inscribe step script not found: ${z_script_path}"
86	
87	  local -r z_body_file="${ZRBFL_RELIQUARY_PREFIX}body.txt"
88	  local -r z_escaped_file="${ZRBFL_RELIQUARY_PREFIX}escaped.txt"
89	
90	  buc_log_args "Reading inscribe step script (skip shebang)"
91	  tail -n +2 "${z_script_path}" > "${z_body_file}" \
92	    || buc_die "Failed to read inscribe step script"
93	  local z_body=""
94	  z_body=$(<"${z_body_file}")
95	  test -n "${z_body}" || buc_die "Empty inscribe script body"
96	
97	  printf '#!/bin/bash\n%s' "${z_body}" > "${z_escaped_file}" \
98	    || buc_die "Failed to write escaped inscribe script body"
99	
100	  local -r z_step_file="${ZRBFL_RELIQUARY_PREFIX}step.json"
101	  echo "[]" > "${z_step_file}" || buc_die "Failed to initialize inscribe step JSON"
102	
103	  local -r z_step_built="${ZRBFL_RELIQUARY_PREFIX}step_built.json"
104	  jq \
105	    --arg name "${z_step_image}" \
106	    --arg id "inscribe-mirror" \
107	    --rawfile script "${z_escaped_file}" \
108	    '. + [{name: $name, id: $id, script: $script}]' \
109	    "${z_step_file}" > "${z_step_built}" \
110	    || buc_die "Failed to build inscribe step JSON"
111	  mv "${z_step_built}" "${z_step_file}" \
112	    || buc_die "Failed to finalize inscribe step JSON"
113	
114	  # Compose Build resource JSON
115	  buc_log_args "Composing inscribe Build resource JSON"
116	  local -r z_build_file="${ZRBFL_RELIQUARY_PREFIX}build.json"
117	
118	  jq -n \
119	    --slurpfile zjq_steps  "${z_step_file}" \
120	    --arg zjq_sa           "${z_mason_sa}" \
121	    --arg zjq_gar_host     "${z_gar_host}" \
122	    --arg zjq_gar_path     "${z_gar_path}" \
123	    --arg zjq_reliquary    "${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}${z_reliquary}" \
124	    --arg zjq_pool         "${RBDC_POOL_TETHER}" \
125	    --arg zjq_timeout      "${RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT}" \
126	    '{
127	      steps: $zjq_steps[0],
128	      substitutions: {
129	        _RBGN_GAR_HOST:     $zjq_gar_host,
130	        _RBGN_GAR_PATH:     $zjq_gar_path,
131	        _RBGN_RELIQUARY:    $zjq_reliquary
132	      },
133	      serviceAccount: $zjq_sa,
134	      options: {
135	        automapSubstitutions: true,
136	        logging: "CLOUD_LOGGING_ONLY",
137	        pool: { name: $zjq_pool }
138	      },
139	      timeout: $zjq_timeout
140	    }' > "${z_build_file}" \
141	    || buc_die "Failed to compose inscribe build JSON"
142	
143	  buc_log_args "Inscribe build JSON: ${z_build_file}"
144	
145	  buc_step "Submitting inscribe Cloud Build"
146	  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${ZRBFC_GCB_PROJECT_BUILDS_URL}" "${z_token}" \
147	    "reliquary_build_create" "${z_build_file}"
148	  rbgu_http_require_ok "Inscribe build submission" "reliquary_build_create"
149	
150	  local z_build_id=""
151	  z_build_id=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "reliquary_build_create" '.metadata.build.id') || z_build_id=""
152	  test -n "${z_build_id}" || buc_die "Build ID not found in builds.create response"
153	  echo "${z_build_id}" > "${ZRBFC_BUILD_ID_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to persist build ID"
154	
155	  local -r z_console_url="${ZRBFC_CLOUD_QUERY_BASE};region=${RBGD_GCB_REGION}/${z_build_id}?project=${RBGD_GCB_PROJECT_ID}"
156	  buc_info "Inscribe build submitted: ${z_build_id}"
157	  buc_link "Click to " "Open build in Cloud Console" "${z_console_url}"
158	
159	  zrbfc_wait_build_completion 120 "Inscribe"  # ~10 minutes at 5s intervals (7 images to pull+push)
160	}
161	
162	######################################################################
163	# Public Functions (rbfl_*)
164	
165	rbfl_inscribe() {
166	  zrbfl_sentinel
167	
168	  buc_doc_brief "Inscribe a reliquary: mirror all tool images from upstream to a datestamped GAR namespace"
169	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
170	
171	  # Authenticate as Director
172	  buc_step "Loading Director RBRA credentials"
173	  source "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to source Director RBRA"
174	
175	  buc_step "Authenticating as Director"
176	  local z_token=""
177	  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") \
178	    || buc_die "Failed to get Director OAuth token"
179	
180	  # Compute reliquary datestamp: r + YYMMDDHHMMSS
181	  local -r z_reliquary="r${BURD_NOW_STAMP:2:6}${BURD_NOW_STAMP:9:6}"
182	  buc_info "Reliquary: ${z_reliquary}"
183	
184	  # Submit inscribe as a Cloud Build job (docker pull/tag/push on GCB)
185	  zrbfl_inscribe_submit "${z_token}" "${z_reliquary}"
186	
187	  buf_write_fact "${RBF_FACT_RELIQUARY}" "${z_reliquary}"
188	
189	  buc_success "Inscribe complete — reliquary ${z_reliquary} created"
190	  buc_info "Add RBRV_RELIQUARY=${z_reliquary} to vessel rbrv.env files to use this reliquary"
191	}
192	
193	rbfl_jettison() {
194	  zrbfl_sentinel
195	
196	  local z_locator="${1:-}"
197	  local z_force="${2:-}"
198	
199	  # Documentation block
200	  buc_doc_brief "Jettison an image tag from the registry by locator"
201	  buc_doc_param "locator" "Image locator in moniker:tag format (e.g., rbev-busybox:20251231T160211Z-img)"
202	  buc_doc_param "--force" "Optional: skip confirmation prompt"
203	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
204	
205	  # Validate locator parameter
206	  test -n "${z_locator}" || buc_die "Locator parameter required (moniker:tag)"
207	
208	  # Parse locator into moniker and tag
209	  case "${z_locator}" in
210	    *:*) : ;;
211	    *)   buc_die "Invalid locator format. Expected moniker:tag" ;;
212	  esac
213	  local z_moniker="${z_locator%%:*}"
214	  local z_tag="${z_locator#*:}"
215	  test -n "${z_moniker}" || buc_die "Moniker is empty in locator"
216	  test -n "${z_tag}" || buc_die "Tag is empty in locator"
217	
218	  # Check for --force flag
219	  local z_skip_confirm=false
220	  if test "${z_force}" = "--force"; then
221	    z_skip_confirm=true
222	  fi
223	
224	  buc_step "Authenticating as Director"
225	
226	  # Get OAuth token using Director credentials
227	  local z_token
228	  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to get OAuth token"
229	
230	  # Confirm jettison unless --force
231	  if test "${z_skip_confirm}" = "false"; then
232	    buc_require "Will jettison: ${z_locator}" "yes"
233	  fi
234	
235	  buc_step "Jettisoning: ${z_locator}"
236	
237	  # Jettison by tag reference
238	  local z_status_file="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}status.txt"
239	  local z_response_file="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}response.json"
240	
241	  curl -X DELETE -s                                   \
242	    --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
243	    --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"             \
244	    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"             \
245	    -w "%{http_code}"                                 \
246	    -o "${z_response_file}"                           \
247	    "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}${z_moniker}/manifests/${z_tag}" \
248	    > "${z_status_file}" || buc_die "DELETE request failed"
249	
250	  local z_http_code
251	  z_http_code=$(<"${z_status_file}")
252	  test -n "${z_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty"
253	
254	  if test "${z_http_code}" != "202" && test "${z_http_code}" != "204"; then
255	    local z_body="empty"
256	    if test -f "${z_response_file}"; then z_body=$(<"${z_response_file}"); fi
257	    buc_warn "Response body: ${z_body}"
258	    buc_die "Jettison failed with HTTP ${z_http_code}"
259	  fi
260	
261	  buc_success "Jettisoned or nonexistent: ${z_locator}"
262	}
263	
264	rbfl_abjure() {
265	  zrbfl_sentinel
266	
267	  local z_hallmark="${2:-}"
268	  local z_force="${3:-}"
269	
270	  # Documentation block
271	  buc_doc_brief "Abjure a hallmark (delete all per-platform image, about, and vouch artifacts)"
272	  buc_doc_param "vessel" "Vessel sigil or path to vessel directory"
273	  buc_doc_param "hallmark" "Full hallmark (e.g., c260305133650-r260305160530)"
274	  buc_doc_param "--force" "Optional: skip confirmation prompt"
275	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
276	
277	  # Resolve vessel argument (sigil or path) and load
278	  zrbfc_resolve_vessel "${1:-}"
279	  local -r z_vessel_dir=$(<"${ZRBFC_VESSEL_RESOLVED_DIR_FILE}")
280	  test -n "${z_vessel_dir}" || buc_die "Empty resolved vessel path"
281	  zrbfc_load_vessel "${z_vessel_dir}"
282	
283	  # Validate remaining parameters
284	  test -n "${z_hallmark}" || buc_die "Hallmark parameter required"
285	
286	  # Check for --force flag
287	  local z_skip_confirm=false
288	  if test "${z_force}" = "--force"; then
289	    z_skip_confirm=true
290	  fi
291	
292	  buc_step "Authenticating as Director"
293	
294	  # Get OAuth token using Director credentials
295	  local z_token
296	  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to get OAuth token"
297	
298	  # Build list of image tags to check/delete
299	  local z_image_tags=()
300	  if test "${RBRV_VESSEL_MODE:-conjure}" = "bind" || test "${RBRV_VESSEL_MODE:-conjure}" = "graft"; then
301	    # Bind and graft vessels have a single image tag (no per-platform suffixes)
302	    z_image_tags+=("${z_hallmark}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}")
303	  else
304	    # Conjure vessels: consumer-facing -image tag + durable -attest-{arch} tags (provenance-carrying)
305	    z_image_tags+=("${z_hallmark}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}")
306	    local z_platforms="${RBRV_CONJURE_PLATFORMS// /,}"
307	    local z_platform_suffixes=()
308	    local z_remaining_plats="${z_platforms}"
309	    local z_plat=""
310	    local z_suffix=""
311	    while test -n "${z_remaining_plats}"; do
312	      z_plat="${z_remaining_plats%%,*}"
313	      z_suffix="${z_plat#linux/}"
314	      z_suffix="${z_suffix//\//}"
315	      z_platform_suffixes+=("-${z_suffix}")
316	      test "${z_remaining_plats}" != "${z_plat}" || break
317	      z_remaining_plats="${z_remaining_plats#*,}"
318	    done
319	
320	    # -attest-{arch} tags — durable provenance-carrying artifacts, deleted by abjure
321	    local z_idx=0
322	    for z_idx in "${!z_platform_suffixes[@]}"; do
323	      z_image_tags+=("${z_hallmark}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ATTEST}${z_platform_suffixes[$z_idx]}")
324	    done
325	  fi
326	
327	  # About, vouch, diags, and pouch tags use full hallmark
328	  local -r z_about_tag="${z_hallmark}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ABOUT}"
329	  local -r z_vouch_tag="${z_hallmark}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_VOUCH}"
330	  local -r z_diags_tag="${z_hallmark}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_DIAGS}"
331	  local -r z_pouch_tag="${z_hallmark}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_POUCH}"
332	
333	  buc_step "Verifying ark existence"
334	
335	  # Check all image tags
336	  local z_existing_image_tags=()
337	  local z_img_tag=""
338	  local z_img_check_idx=0
339	  for z_img_tag in "${z_image_tags[@]}"; do
340	    local z_img_status_file="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}image_${z_img_check_idx}_status.txt"
341	    local z_img_response_file="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}image_${z_img_check_idx}_response.json"
342	
343	    curl --head -s                                     \
344	      --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
345	      --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"           \
346	      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"           \
347	      -H "Accept: ${ZRBFC_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}"     \
348	      -w "%{http_code}"                               \
349	      -o "${z_img_response_file}"                     \
350	      "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}${RBRV_SIGIL}/manifests/${z_img_tag}" \
351	      > "${z_img_status_file}" || buc_die "HEAD request failed for image tag: ${z_img_tag}"
352	
353	    local z_img_http_code
354	    z_img_http_code=$(<"${z_img_status_file}")
355	    test -n "${z_img_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for image tag: ${z_img_tag}"
356	
357	    if test "${z_img_http_code}" = "200"; then
358	      z_existing_image_tags+=("${z_img_tag}")
359	    elif test "${z_img_http_code}" != "404"; then
360	      buc_die "Unexpected HTTP status ${z_img_http_code} for image tag: ${z_img_tag}"
361	    fi
362	    z_img_check_idx=$((z_img_check_idx + 1))
363	  done
364	
365	  # Check if -about artifact exists
366	  local z_about_status_file="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}about_status.txt"
367	  local z_about_response_file="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}about_response.json"
368	
369	  curl --head -s                                     \
370	    --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
371	    --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"           \
372	    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"           \
373	    -H "Accept: ${ZRBFC_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}"     \
374	    -w "%{http_code}"                               \
375	    -o "${z_about_response_file}"                   \
376	    "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}${RBRV_SIGIL}/manifests/${z_about_tag}" \
377	    > "${z_about_status_file}" || buc_die "HEAD request failed for -about artifact"
378	
379	  local z_about_http_code
380	  z_about_http_code=$(<"${z_about_status_file}")
381	  test -n "${z_about_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for -about"
382	
383	  local z_about_exists=false
384	  if test "${z_about_http_code}" = "200"; then
385	    z_about_exists=true
386	  elif test "${z_about_http_code}" != "404"; then
387	    buc_die "Unexpected HTTP status ${z_about_http_code} when checking -about artifact"
388	  fi
389	
390	  # Check if -vouch artifact exists (optional — older arks won't have one)
391	  local z_vouch_status_file="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}vouch_status.txt"
392	  local z_vouch_response_file="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}vouch_response.json"
393	
394	  curl --head -s                                     \
395	    --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
396	    --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"           \
397	    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"           \
398	    -H "Accept: ${ZRBFC_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}"     \
399	    -w "%{http_code}"                               \
400	    -o "${z_vouch_response_file}"                   \
401	    "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}${RBRV_SIGIL}/manifests/${z_vouch_tag}" \
402	    > "${z_vouch_status_file}" || buc_die "HEAD request failed for -vouch artifact"
403	
404	  local z_vouch_http_code
405	  z_vouch_http_code=$(<"${z_vouch_status_file}")
406	  test -n "${z_vouch_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for -vouch"
407	
408	  local z_vouch_exists=false
409	  if test "${z_vouch_http_code}" = "200"; then
410	    z_vouch_exists=true
411	  elif test "${z_vouch_http_code}" != "404"; then
412	    buc_die "Unexpected HTTP status ${z_vouch_http_code} when checking -vouch artifact"
413	  fi
414	
415	  # Check if -diags artifact exists (optional — conjure-only, absent for bind/graft)
416	  local z_diags_status_file="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}diags_status.txt"
417	  local z_diags_response_file="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}diags_response.json"
418	
419	  curl --head -s                                     \
420	    --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
421	    --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"           \
422	    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"           \
423	    -H "Accept: ${ZRBFC_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}"     \
424	    -w "%{http_code}"                               \
425	    -o "${z_diags_response_file}"                   \
426	    "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}${RBRV_SIGIL}/manifests/${z_diags_tag}" \
427	    > "${z_diags_status_file}" || buc_die "HEAD request failed for -diags artifact"
428	
429	  local z_diags_http_code
430	  z_diags_http_code=$(<"${z_diags_status_file}")
431	  test -n "${z_diags_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for -diags"
432	
433	  local z_diags_exists=false
434	  if test "${z_diags_http_code}" = "200"; then
435	    z_diags_exists=true
436	  elif test "${z_diags_http_code}" != "404"; then
437	    buc_die "Unexpected HTTP status ${z_diags_http_code} when checking -diags artifact"
438	  fi
439	
440	  # Check if pouch artifact exists (optional — conjure/bind only, absent for graft)
441	  local z_pouch_status_file="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}pouch_status.txt"
442	  local z_pouch_response_file="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}pouch_response.json"
443	
444	  curl --head -s                                     \
445	    --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
446	    --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"           \
447	    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"           \
448	    -H "Accept: ${ZRBFC_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}"     \
449	    -w "%{http_code}"                               \
450	    -o "${z_pouch_response_file}"                   \
451	    "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}${RBRV_SIGIL}/manifests/${z_pouch_tag}" \
452	    > "${z_pouch_status_file}" || buc_die "HEAD request failed for ${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_POUCH} artifact"
453	
454	  local z_pouch_http_code
455	  z_pouch_http_code=$(<"${z_pouch_status_file}")
456	  test -n "${z_pouch_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for ${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_POUCH}"
457	
458	  local z_pouch_exists=false
459	  if test "${z_pouch_http_code}" = "200"; then
460	    z_pouch_exists=true
461	  elif test "${z_pouch_http_code}" != "404"; then
462	    buc_die "Unexpected HTTP status ${z_pouch_http_code} when checking ${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_POUCH} artifact"
463	  fi
464	
465	  # Evaluate ark state
466	  if test "${#z_existing_image_tags[@]}" -eq 0 && test "${z_about_exists}" = "false"; then
467	    buc_die "Hallmark not found: no image tags and no -about exists for ${RBRV_SIGIL}/${z_hallmark}"
468	  fi
469	
470	  if test "${#z_existing_image_tags[@]}" -gt 0 && test "${z_about_exists}" = "false"; then
471	    buc_warn "Orphaned artifact detected: image tags exist but -about is missing"
472	  elif test "${#z_existing_image_tags[@]}" -eq 0 && test "${z_about_exists}" = "true"; then
473	    buc_warn "Orphaned artifact detected: -about exists but no image tags found"
474	  fi
475	
476	  # Confirm abjuration unless --force
477	  if test "${z_skip_confirm}" = "false"; then
478	    local z_confirm_msg="Will abjure ark ${RBRV_SIGIL}/${z_hallmark}:"
479	    if (( ${#z_existing_image_tags[@]} )); then
480	      for z_img_tag in "${z_existing_image_tags[@]}"; do

482	      done
483	    fi
484	    if test "${z_about_exists}" = "true"; then
485	      z_confirm_msg="${z_confirm_msg}\n  - ${RBRV_SIGIL}:${z_about_tag}"
486	    fi
487	    if test "${z_vouch_exists}" = "true"; then
488	      z_confirm_msg="${z_confirm_msg}\n  - ${RBRV_SIGIL}:${z_vouch_tag}"
489	    fi
490	    if test "${z_diags_exists}" = "true"; then
491	      z_confirm_msg="${z_confirm_msg}\n  - ${RBRV_SIGIL}:${z_diags_tag}"
492	    fi
493	    if test "${z_pouch_exists}" = "true"; then
494	      z_confirm_msg="${z_confirm_msg}\n  - ${RBRV_SIGIL}:${z_pouch_tag}"
495	    fi
496	    buc_require "${z_confirm_msg}" "yes"
497	  fi
498	
499	  # Delete all existing image tags
500	  if (( ${#z_existing_image_tags[@]} )); then
501	    local z_img_del_idx=0
502	    for z_img_tag in "${z_existing_image_tags[@]}"; do
503	      buc_step "Deleting image tag: ${z_img_tag}"
504	
505	      local z_delete_img_status="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}delete_image_${z_img_del_idx}_status.txt"
506	      local z_delete_img_response="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}delete_image_${z_img_del_idx}_response.json"
507	
508	      curl -X DELETE -s                                   \
509	        --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
510	        --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"             \
511	        -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"             \
512	        -w "%{http_code}"                                 \
513	        -o "${z_delete_img_response}"                     \
514	        "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}${RBRV_SIGIL}/manifests/${z_img_tag}" \
515	        > "${z_delete_img_status}" || buc_die "DELETE request failed for image tag: ${z_img_tag}"
516	
517	      local z_delete_img_code
518	      z_delete_img_code=$(<"${z_delete_img_status}")
519	      test -n "${z_delete_img_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for image tag delete: ${z_img_tag}"
520	
521	      if test "${z_delete_img_code}" != "202" && test "${z_delete_img_code}" != "204"; then
522	        local z_body="empty"
523	        if test -f "${z_delete_img_response}"; then z_body=$(<"${z_delete_img_response}"); fi
524	        buc_warn "Response body: ${z_body}"
525	        buc_die "Failed to delete image tag ${z_img_tag} (HTTP ${z_delete_img_code})"
526	      fi
527	
528	      buc_info "Deleted: ${RBRV_SIGIL}:${z_img_tag}"
529	      z_img_del_idx=$((z_img_del_idx + 1))
530	    done
531	  fi
532	
533	  # Delete -about artifact if exists
534	  if test "${z_about_exists}" = "true"; then
535	    buc_step "Deleting -about artifact"
536	
537	    local z_delete_about_status="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}delete_about_status.txt"
538	    local z_delete_about_response="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}delete_about_response.json"
539	
540	    curl -X DELETE -s                                   \
541	      --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
542	      --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"             \
543	      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"             \
544	      -w "%{http_code}"                                 \
545	      -o "${z_delete_about_response}"                   \
546	      "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}${RBRV_SIGIL}/manifests/${z_about_tag}" \
547	      > "${z_delete_about_status}" || buc_die "DELETE request failed for -about"
548	
549	    local z_delete_about_code
550	    z_delete_about_code=$(<"${z_delete_about_status}")
551	    test -n "${z_delete_about_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for -about delete"
552	
553	    if test "${z_delete_about_code}" != "202" && test "${z_delete_about_code}" != "204"; then
554	      local z_body="empty"
555	      if test -f "${z_delete_about_response}"; then z_body=$(<"${z_delete_about_response}"); fi
556	      buc_warn "Response body: ${z_body}"
557	      buc_die "Failed to delete -about artifact (HTTP ${z_delete_about_code})"
558	    fi
559	
560	    buc_info "Deleted: ${RBRV_SIGIL}:${z_about_tag}"
561	  fi
562	
563	  # Delete -vouch artifact if exists (optional — older arks won't have one)
564	  if test "${z_vouch_exists}" = "true"; then
565	    buc_step "Deleting -vouch artifact"
566	
567	    local z_delete_vouch_status="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}delete_vouch_status.txt"
568	    local z_delete_vouch_response="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}delete_vouch_response.json"
569	
570	    curl -X DELETE -s                                   \
571	      --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
572	      --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"             \
573	      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"             \
574	      -w "%{http_code}"                                 \
575	      -o "${z_delete_vouch_response}"                   \
576	      "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}${RBRV_SIGIL}/manifests/${z_vouch_tag}" \
577	      > "${z_delete_vouch_status}" || buc_die "DELETE request failed for -vouch"
578	
579	    local z_delete_vouch_code
580	    z_delete_vouch_code=$(<"${z_delete_vouch_status}")
581	    test -n "${z_delete_vouch_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for -vouch delete"
582	
583	    if test "${z_delete_vouch_code}" != "202" && test "${z_delete_vouch_code}" != "204"; then
584	      local z_body="empty"
585	      if test -f "${z_delete_vouch_response}"; then z_body=$(<"${z_delete_vouch_response}"); fi
586	      buc_warn "Response body: ${z_body}"
587	      buc_die "Failed to delete -vouch artifact (HTTP ${z_delete_vouch_code})"
588	    fi
589	
590	    buc_info "Deleted: ${RBRV_SIGIL}:${z_vouch_tag}"
591	  fi
592	
593	  # Delete -diags artifact if exists (optional — conjure-only)
594	  if test "${z_diags_exists}" = "true"; then
595	    buc_step "Deleting -diags artifact"
596	
597	    local z_delete_diags_status="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}delete_diags_status.txt"
598	    local z_delete_diags_response="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}delete_diags_response.json"
599	
600	    curl -X DELETE -s                                   \
601	      --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
602	      --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"             \
603	      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"             \
604	      -w "%{http_code}"                                 \
605	      -o "${z_delete_diags_response}"                   \
606	      "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}${RBRV_SIGIL}/manifests/${z_diags_tag}" \
607	      > "${z_delete_diags_status}" || buc_die "DELETE request failed for -diags"
608	
609	    local z_delete_diags_code
610	    z_delete_diags_code=$(<"${z_delete_diags_status}")
611	    test -n "${z_delete_diags_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for -diags delete"
612	
613	    if test "${z_delete_diags_code}" != "202" && test "${z_delete_diags_code}" != "204"; then
614	      local z_body="empty"
615	      if test -f "${z_delete_diags_response}"; then z_body=$(<"${z_delete_diags_response}"); fi
616	      buc_warn "Response body: ${z_body}"
617	      buc_die "Failed to delete -diags artifact (HTTP ${z_delete_diags_code})"
618	    fi
619	
620	    buc_info "Deleted: ${RBRV_SIGIL}:${z_diags_tag}"
621	  fi
622	
623	  # Delete pouch artifact if exists (optional — conjure/bind only)
624	  if test "${z_pouch_exists}" = "true"; then
625	    buc_step "Deleting ${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_POUCH} artifact"
626	
627	    local z_delete_pouch_status="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}delete_pouch_status.txt"
628	    local z_delete_pouch_response="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}delete_pouch_response.json"
629	
630	    curl -X DELETE -s                                   \
631	      --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
632	      --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"             \
633	      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"             \
634	      -w "%{http_code}"                                 \
635	      -o "${z_delete_pouch_response}"                   \
636	      "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}${RBRV_SIGIL}/manifests/${z_pouch_tag}" \
637	      > "${z_delete_pouch_status}" || buc_die "DELETE request failed for ${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_POUCH}"
638	
639	    local z_delete_pouch_code
640	    z_delete_pouch_code=$(<"${z_delete_pouch_status}")
641	    test -n "${z_delete_pouch_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for ${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_POUCH} delete"
642	
643	    if test "${z_delete_pouch_code}" != "202" && test "${z_delete_pouch_code}" != "204"; then
644	      local z_body="empty"
645	      if test -f "${z_delete_pouch_response}"; then z_body=$(<"${z_delete_pouch_response}"); fi
646	      buc_warn "Response body: ${z_body}"
647	      buc_die "Failed to delete ${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_POUCH} artifact (HTTP ${z_delete_pouch_code})"
648	    fi
649	
650	    buc_info "Deleted: ${RBRV_SIGIL}:${z_pouch_tag}"
651	  fi
652	
653	  # Display results
654	  echo ""
655	  buc_success "Hallmark abjured: ${RBRV_SIGIL}/${z_hallmark}"
656	  if (( ${#z_existing_image_tags[@]} )); then
657	    for z_img_tag in "${z_existing_image_tags[@]}"; do
658	      echo "  - ${RBRV_SIGIL}:${z_img_tag} deleted"
659	    done
660	  fi
661	  if test "${z_about_exists}" = "true"; then
662	    echo "  - ${RBRV_SIGIL}:${z_about_tag} deleted"
663	  fi
664	  if test "${z_vouch_exists}" = "true"; then
665	    echo "  - ${RBRV_SIGIL}:${z_vouch_tag} deleted"
666	  fi
667	  if test "${z_diags_exists}" = "true"; then
668	    echo "  - ${RBRV_SIGIL}:${z_diags_tag} deleted"

673	}
674	
675	rbfl_tally() {
676	  zrbfl_sentinel
677	
678	  buc_doc_brief "List hallmarks across all vessels with health status"
679	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
680	
681	  buc_step "Enumerating vessels"
682	  local z_sigils
683	  z_sigils=$(rbrv_list_capture) || buc_die "No vessels found"
684	
685	  buc_step "Authenticating as Retriever"
686	  test -f "${RBDC_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}" || buc_die "Retriever credential not found: ${RBDC_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}"
687	  local z_token
688	  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to get OAuth token"
689	
690	  local z_any_pending=0
691	  local z_any_incomplete=0
692	
693	  local z_sigil=""
694	  for z_sigil in ${z_sigils}; do
695	
696	    buc_debug "Querying GAR tags for ${z_sigil}"
697	    local z_tags_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfl_dc_${z_sigil}_tags.json"
698	    local z_stderr_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfl_dc_${z_sigil}_stderr.txt"
699	    curl -sL \
700	      --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
701	      --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}" \
702	      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
703	      "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}${z_sigil}/tags/list" \
704	      > "${z_tags_file}" 2>"${z_stderr_file}" \
705	      || buc_die "Failed to fetch tags for ${z_sigil} — see ${z_stderr_file}"
706	
707	    if jq -e '.errors' "${z_tags_file}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
708	      local z_err
709	      jq -r '.errors[0].message // "Unknown error"' "${z_tags_file}" > "${ZRBFC_SCRATCH_FILE}" \
710	        || buc_die "Failed to extract error message from registry response for ${z_sigil}"
711	      z_err=$(<"${ZRBFC_SCRATCH_FILE}")
712	      buc_die "Registry API error for ${z_sigil}: ${z_err}"
713	    fi
714	
715	    # Extract tags and identify full hallmarks
716	    local z_all_tags_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfl_dc_${z_sigil}_all_tags.txt"
717	    jq -r '.tags[]? // empty' "${z_tags_file}" > "${z_all_tags_file}" \
718	      || buc_die "Failed to extract tags for ${z_sigil}"
719	
720	    local z_consec_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfl_dc_${z_sigil}_hallmarks.txt"
721	    local z_tag_data_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfl_dc_${z_sigil}_tag_data.txt"
722	    : > "${z_consec_file}"
723	    : > "${z_tag_data_file}"
724	
725	    while IFS= read -r z_tag || test -n "${z_tag}"; do
726	      local z_consec=""
727	      if [[ "${z_tag}" =~ ^([cbg][0-9]{12}-r[0-9]{12}) ]]; then
728	        z_consec="${BASH_REMATCH[1]}"
729	      else
730	        continue
731	      fi
732	
733	      case "${z_tag}" in
734	        *"${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ATTEST}"-*)
735	          # Durable -attest-{arch} tags — provenance-carrying artifacts
736	          local z_attest_suffix="${z_tag#*"${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ATTEST}"}"
737	          echo "${z_consec}|attest|${z_attest_suffix#-}" >> "${z_tag_data_file}"
738	          echo "${z_consec}" >> "${z_consec_file}"
739	          ;;
740	        *"${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}")
741	          echo "${z_consec}|image|consumer" >> "${z_tag_data_file}"
742	          echo "${z_consec}" >> "${z_consec_file}"
743	          ;;
744	        *"${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_VOUCH}")
745	          echo "${z_consec}|vouch|" >> "${z_tag_data_file}"
746	          echo "${z_consec}" >> "${z_consec_file}"
747	          ;;
748	        *"${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ABOUT}")
749	          echo "${z_consec}|about|" >> "${z_tag_data_file}"
750	          echo "${z_consec}" >> "${z_consec_file}"
751	          ;;
752	        *"${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_DIAGS}")
753	          echo "${z_consec}|diags|" >> "${z_tag_data_file}"
754	          echo "${z_consec}" >> "${z_consec_file}"
755	          ;;
756	        *"${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_POUCH}")
757	          echo "${z_consec}|pouch|" >> "${z_tag_data_file}"
758	          echo "${z_consec}" >> "${z_consec_file}"
759	          ;;
760	      esac
761	    done < "${z_all_tags_file}"
762	
763	    local z_unique_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfl_dc_${z_sigil}_unique.txt"
764	    sort -ur "${z_consec_file}" > "${z_unique_file}" \
765	      || buc_die "Failed to sort hallmarks for ${z_sigil}"
766	
767	    if ! test -s "${z_unique_file}"; then
768	      buc_debug "No hallmarks found for ${z_sigil}"
769	      continue
770	    fi
771	
772	    # Display per-vessel table with health states
773	    printf "\nVessel: %s\n" "${z_sigil}"
774	    printf "  %-42s %-30s %-10s\n" "Hallmark" "Platforms" "Health"
775	
776	    while IFS= read -r z_hallmark || test -n "${z_hallmark}"; do
777	      local z_consec_platforms=""
778	      local z_has_about="no"
779	      local z_has_vouch="no"
780	      local z_has_image="no"
781	
782	      while IFS='|' read -r z_c z_type z_detail; do
783	        test "${z_c}" = "${z_hallmark}" || continue
784	        if test "${z_type}" = "image"; then
785	          z_has_image="yes"
786	        elif test "${z_type}" = "attest"; then
787	          z_has_image="yes"
788	          if test -n "${z_consec_platforms}"; then
789	            z_consec_platforms="${z_consec_platforms},${z_detail}"
790	          else
791	            z_consec_platforms="${z_detail}"
792	          fi
793	        elif test "${z_type}" = "about"; then
794	          z_has_about="yes"
795	        elif test "${z_type}" = "vouch"; then
796	          z_has_vouch="yes"
797	        fi
798	      done < "${z_tag_data_file}"
799	
800	      local z_plat_display="${z_consec_platforms:-single}"
801	      local z_health=""
802	      if test "${z_has_about}" = "yes" && test "${z_has_vouch}" = "yes"; then
803	        z_health="vouched"
804	      elif test "${z_has_about}" = "yes" && test "${z_has_vouch}" = "no"; then
805	        z_health="pending"
806	        z_any_pending=1
807	      elif test "${z_has_image}" = "yes" && test "${z_has_about}" = "no"; then
808	        z_health="incomplete"
809	        z_any_incomplete=1
810	      fi
811	
812	      printf "  %-42s %-30s %-10s\n" "${z_hallmark}" "${z_plat_display}" "${z_health}"
813	
814	      # Write per-hallmark fact file for test observability
815	      test -n "${z_hallmark}" || buc_die "Empty hallmark in unique file for ${z_sigil}"
816	      buf_write_fact "${z_sigil}${RBCC_FACT_CONSEC_INFIX}${z_hallmark}" "${z_sigil}"
817	    done < "${z_unique_file}"
818	
819	  done
820	
821	  echo ""
822	
823	  # Tabtarget recommendations
824	  if test "${z_any_pending}" = "1"; then
825	    buc_step "Pending hallmarks can be vouched:"
826	    buc_tabtarget "${RBZ_VOUCH_HALLMARKS}"
827	  fi
828	  if test "${z_any_incomplete}" = "1"; then
829	    buc_step "Incomplete hallmarks should be abjured and re-conjured:"
830	    buc_tabtarget "${RBZ_ABJURE_HALLMARK}"
831	  fi
832	
833	  buc_success "Hallmark check complete"
834	}
835	
836	rbfl_rekon() {
837	  zrbfl_sentinel
838	
839	  local z_moniker="${1:-}"
840	
841	  buc_doc_brief "List all tags for a vessel package in the registry"
842	  buc_doc_param "moniker" "Vessel moniker (e.g., rbev-sentry-deb-tether)"
843	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
844	
845	  if test -z "${z_moniker}"; then
846	    local z_sigils
847	    z_sigils=$(rbrv_list_capture 2>/dev/null) || true
848	    buc_warn "Vessel moniker parameter required"
849	    if test -n "${z_sigils}"; then
850	      buc_bare "  Available vessels:"
851	      local z_s=""
852	      for z_s in ${z_sigils}; do
853	        buc_bare "    ${z_s}"
854	      done
855	    fi
856	    buc_die "Usage: rbw-ir <vessel-moniker>"
857	  fi
858	
859	  buc_step "Authenticating as Director"
860	  local z_token
861	  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to get OAuth token"
862	
863	  buc_step "Fetching tags for ${z_moniker}"
864	  local z_tags_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfl_rekon_tags.json"
865	  local z_stderr_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfl_rekon_stderr.txt"
866	  curl -sL \
867	    --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
868	    --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}" \
869	    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
870	    "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}${z_moniker}/tags/list" \
871	    > "${z_tags_file}" 2>"${z_stderr_file}" \
872	    || buc_die "Failed to fetch tags for ${z_moniker} — see ${z_stderr_file}"
873	
874	  if jq -e '.errors' "${z_tags_file}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
875	    local z_err
876	    jq -r '.errors[0].message // "Unknown error"' "${z_tags_file}" > "${ZRBFC_SCRATCH_FILE}" \
877	      || buc_die "Failed to extract error message from registry response"
878	    z_err=$(<"${ZRBFC_SCRATCH_FILE}")
879	    buc_die "Registry API error for ${z_moniker}: ${z_err}"
880	  fi
881	
882	  local z_all_tags_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfl_rekon_all_tags.txt"
883	  jq -r '.tags[]? // empty' "${z_tags_file}" > "${z_all_tags_file}" \
884	    || buc_die "Failed to extract tags"
885	
886	  local z_count
887	  z_count=$(wc -l < "${z_all_tags_file}" | tr -d ' ')
888	
889	  printf "\nVessel: %s  (%s tags)\n\n" "${z_moniker}" "${z_count}"
890	  if test -s "${z_all_tags_file}"; then
891	    sort "${z_all_tags_file}"
892	  else
893	    echo "  (no tags)"
894	  fi
895	
896	  buc_success "Rekon complete"
897	}
898	
899	
900	# eof
901

#!/bin/bash
#
# Copyright 2026 Scale Invariant, Inc.
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at
#
#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
#
# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.
#
# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
#
# Recipe Bottle Foundry Ledger - inscribe, jettison, abjure, rekon, and tally operations
# Director credentials for inscribe, jettison, abjure, rekon; retriever credentials for tally

set -euo pipefail

# Multiple inclusion detection
test -z "${ZRBFL_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbfl multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
ZRBFL_SOURCED=1

# Source shared Foundry Core module
source "${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}/rbfc_FoundryCore.sh"

######################################################################
# Internal Functions (zrbfl_*)

zrbfl_kindle() {
  test -z "${ZRBFL_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbfl already kindled"

  buc_log_args 'Validate Foundry Core is kindled'
  zrbfc_sentinel

  buc_log_args 'Verify Director RBRA file'
  test -n "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE:-}" || buc_die "RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE not set"
  test -f "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}"   || buc_die "GCB service env file not found: ${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}"

  buc_log_args 'RBGJI inscribe step scripts (same Tools directory)'
  local z_self_dir="${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}"
  readonly ZRBFL_RBGJI_STEPS_DIR="${z_self_dir}/rbgji"
  test -d "${ZRBFL_RBGJI_STEPS_DIR}"   || buc_die "RBGJI steps directory not found: ${ZRBFL_RBGJI_STEPS_DIR}"

  buc_log_args 'Define delete operation file prefix'
  readonly ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfl_delete_"

  buc_log_args 'Define reliquary inscribe operation file prefix'
  readonly ZRBFL_RELIQUARY_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfl_reliquary_"

  readonly ZRBFL_KINDLED=1
}

zrbfl_sentinel() {
  zrbfc_sentinel
  test "${ZRBFL_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbfl not kindled - call zrbfl_kindle first"
}

######################################################################
# Internal Helpers (zrbfl_*)

# Internal: Submit inscribe Cloud Build job.
# Single step: docker pull each upstream tool image, tag for GAR, push.
# Uses gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker as step image (always pullable — Google-hosted).
zrbfl_inscribe_submit() {
  zrbfl_sentinel

  local -r z_token="${1:?Token required}"
  local -r z_reliquary="${2:?Reliquary datestamp required}"

  buc_step "Constructing inscribe Cloud Build resource"
  local -r z_gar_host="${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}"
  local -r z_gar_path="${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY}"
  local -r z_mason_sa="projects/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/serviceAccounts/${RBGD_MASON_EMAIL}"

  # Inscribe step image: Google-hosted docker builder (always pullable, even under NO_PUBLIC_EGRESS)
  local -r z_step_image="gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker"

  # Assemble inscribe step from script
  local -r z_script_path="${ZRBFL_RBGJI_STEPS_DIR}/rbgji01-inscribe-mirror.sh"
  test -f "${z_script_path}" || buc_die "Inscribe step script not found: ${z_script_path}"

  local -r z_body_file="${ZRBFL_RELIQUARY_PREFIX}body.txt"
  local -r z_escaped_file="${ZRBFL_RELIQUARY_PREFIX}escaped.txt"

  buc_log_args "Reading inscribe step script (skip shebang)"
  tail -n +2 "${z_script_path}" > "${z_body_file}" \
    || buc_die "Failed to read inscribe step script"
  local z_body=""
  z_body=$(<"${z_body_file}")
  test -n "${z_body}" || buc_die "Empty inscribe script body"

  printf '#!/bin/bash\n%s' "${z_body}" > "${z_escaped_file}" \
    || buc_die "Failed to write escaped inscribe script body"

  local -r z_step_file="${ZRBFL_RELIQUARY_PREFIX}step.json"
  echo "[]" > "${z_step_file}" || buc_die "Failed to initialize inscribe step JSON"

  local -r z_step_built="${ZRBFL_RELIQUARY_PREFIX}step_built.json"
  jq \
    --arg name "${z_step_image}" \
    --arg id "inscribe-mirror" \
    --rawfile script "${z_escaped_file}" \
    '. + [{name: $name, id: $id, script: $script}]' \
    "${z_step_file}" > "${z_step_built}" \
    || buc_die "Failed to build inscribe step JSON"
  mv "${z_step_built}" "${z_step_file}" \
    || buc_die "Failed to finalize inscribe step JSON"

  # Compose Build resource JSON
  buc_log_args "Composing inscribe Build resource JSON"
  local -r z_build_file="${ZRBFL_RELIQUARY_PREFIX}build.json"

  jq -n \
    --slurpfile zjq_steps  "${z_step_file}" \
    --arg zjq_sa           "${z_mason_sa}" \
    --arg zjq_gar_host     "${z_gar_host}" \
    --arg zjq_gar_path     "${z_gar_path}" \
    --arg zjq_reliquary    "${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}${z_reliquary}" \
    --arg zjq_pool         "${RBDC_POOL_TETHER}" \
    --arg zjq_timeout      "${RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT}" \
    '{
      steps: $zjq_steps[0],
      substitutions: {
        _RBGN_GAR_HOST:     $zjq_gar_host,
        _RBGN_GAR_PATH:     $zjq_gar_path,
        _RBGN_RELIQUARY:    $zjq_reliquary
      },
      serviceAccount: $zjq_sa,
      options: {
        automapSubstitutions: true,
        logging: "CLOUD_LOGGING_ONLY",
        pool: { name: $zjq_pool }
      },
      timeout: $zjq_timeout
    }' > "${z_build_file}" \
    || buc_die "Failed to compose inscribe build JSON"

  buc_log_args "Inscribe build JSON: ${z_build_file}"

  buc_step "Submitting inscribe Cloud Build"
  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${ZRBFC_GCB_PROJECT_BUILDS_URL}" "${z_token}" \
    "reliquary_build_create" "${z_build_file}"
  rbgu_http_require_ok "Inscribe build submission" "reliquary_build_create"

  local z_build_id=""
  z_build_id=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "reliquary_build_create" '.metadata.build.id') || z_build_id=""
  test -n "${z_build_id}" || buc_die "Build ID not found in builds.create response"
  echo "${z_build_id}" > "${ZRBFC_BUILD_ID_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to persist build ID"

  local -r z_console_url="${ZRBFC_CLOUD_QUERY_BASE};region=${RBGD_GCB_REGION}/${z_build_id}?project=${RBGD_GCB_PROJECT_ID}"
  buc_info "Inscribe build submitted: ${z_build_id}"
  buc_link "Click to " "Open build in Cloud Console" "${z_console_url}"

  zrbfc_wait_build_completion 120 "Inscribe"  # ~10 minutes at 5s intervals (7 images to pull+push)
}

######################################################################
# Public Functions (rbfl_*)

rbfl_inscribe() {
  zrbfl_sentinel

  buc_doc_brief "Inscribe a reliquary: mirror all tool images from upstream to a datestamped GAR namespace"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  # Authenticate as Director
  buc_step "Loading Director RBRA credentials"
  source "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to source Director RBRA"

  buc_step "Authenticating as Director"
  local z_token=""
  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") \
    || buc_die "Failed to get Director OAuth token"

  # Compute reliquary datestamp: r + YYMMDDHHMMSS
  local -r z_reliquary="r${BURD_NOW_STAMP:2:6}${BURD_NOW_STAMP:9:6}"
  buc_info "Reliquary: ${z_reliquary}"

  # Submit inscribe as a Cloud Build job (docker pull/tag/push on GCB)
  zrbfl_inscribe_submit "${z_token}" "${z_reliquary}"

  buf_write_fact "${RBF_FACT_RELIQUARY}" "${z_reliquary}"

  buc_success "Inscribe complete — reliquary ${z_reliquary} created"
  buc_info "Add RBRV_RELIQUARY=${z_reliquary} to vessel rbrv.env files to use this reliquary"
}

rbfl_jettison() {
  zrbfl_sentinel

  local z_locator="${1:-}"
  local z_force="${2:-}"

  # Documentation block
  buc_doc_brief "Jettison an image tag from the registry by locator"
  buc_doc_param "locator" "Image locator in moniker:tag format (e.g., rbev-busybox:20251231T160211Z-img)"
  buc_doc_param "--force" "Optional: skip confirmation prompt"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  # Validate locator parameter
  test -n "${z_locator}" || buc_die "Locator parameter required (moniker:tag)"

  # Parse locator into moniker and tag
  case "${z_locator}" in
    *:*) : ;;
    *)   buc_die "Invalid locator format. Expected moniker:tag" ;;
  esac
  local z_moniker="${z_locator%%:*}"
  local z_tag="${z_locator#*:}"
  test -n "${z_moniker}" || buc_die "Moniker is empty in locator"
  test -n "${z_tag}" || buc_die "Tag is empty in locator"

  # Check for --force flag
  local z_skip_confirm=false
  if test "${z_force}" = "--force"; then
    z_skip_confirm=true
  fi

  buc_step "Authenticating as Director"

  # Get OAuth token using Director credentials
  local z_token
  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to get OAuth token"

  # Confirm jettison unless --force
  if test "${z_skip_confirm}" = "false"; then
    buc_require "Will jettison: ${z_locator}" "yes"
  fi

  buc_step "Jettisoning: ${z_locator}"

  # Jettison by tag reference
  local z_status_file="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}status.txt"
  local z_response_file="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}response.json"

  curl -X DELETE -s                                   \
    --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
    --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"             \
    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"             \
    -w "%{http_code}"                                 \
    -o "${z_response_file}"                           \
    "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}${z_moniker}/manifests/${z_tag}" \
    > "${z_status_file}" || buc_die "DELETE request failed"

  local z_http_code
  z_http_code=$(<"${z_status_file}")
  test -n "${z_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty"

  if test "${z_http_code}" != "202" && test "${z_http_code}" != "204"; then
    local z_body="empty"
    if test -f "${z_response_file}"; then z_body=$(<"${z_response_file}"); fi
    buc_warn "Response body: ${z_body}"
    buc_die "Jettison failed with HTTP ${z_http_code}"
  fi

  buc_success "Jettisoned or nonexistent: ${z_locator}"
}

rbfl_abjure() {
  zrbfl_sentinel

  local z_hallmark="${2:-}"
  local z_force="${3:-}"

  # Documentation block
  buc_doc_brief "Abjure a hallmark (delete all per-platform image, about, and vouch artifacts)"
  buc_doc_param "vessel" "Vessel sigil or path to vessel directory"
  buc_doc_param "hallmark" "Full hallmark (e.g., c260305133650-r260305160530)"
  buc_doc_param "--force" "Optional: skip confirmation prompt"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  # Resolve vessel argument (sigil or path) and load
  zrbfc_resolve_vessel "${1:-}"
  local -r z_vessel_dir=$(<"${ZRBFC_VESSEL_RESOLVED_DIR_FILE}")
  test -n "${z_vessel_dir}" || buc_die "Empty resolved vessel path"
  zrbfc_load_vessel "${z_vessel_dir}"

  # Validate remaining parameters
  test -n "${z_hallmark}" || buc_die "Hallmark parameter required"

  # Check for --force flag
  local z_skip_confirm=false
  if test "${z_force}" = "--force"; then
    z_skip_confirm=true
  fi

  buc_step "Authenticating as Director"

  # Get OAuth token using Director credentials
  local z_token
  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to get OAuth token"

  # Build list of image tags to check/delete
  local z_image_tags=()
  if test "${RBRV_VESSEL_MODE:-conjure}" = "bind" || test "${RBRV_VESSEL_MODE:-conjure}" = "graft"; then
    # Bind and graft vessels have a single image tag (no per-platform suffixes)
    z_image_tags+=("${z_hallmark}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}")
  else
    # Conjure vessels: consumer-facing -image tag + durable -attest-{arch} tags (provenance-carrying)
    z_image_tags+=("${z_hallmark}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}")
    local z_platforms="${RBRV_CONJURE_PLATFORMS// /,}"
    local z_platform_suffixes=()
    local z_remaining_plats="${z_platforms}"
    local z_plat=""
    local z_suffix=""
    while test -n "${z_remaining_plats}"; do
      z_plat="${z_remaining_plats%%,*}"
      z_suffix="${z_plat#linux/}"
      z_suffix="${z_suffix//\//}"
      z_platform_suffixes+=("-${z_suffix}")
      test "${z_remaining_plats}" != "${z_plat}" || break
      z_remaining_plats="${z_remaining_plats#*,}"
    done

    # -attest-{arch} tags — durable provenance-carrying artifacts, deleted by abjure
    local z_idx=0
    for z_idx in "${!z_platform_suffixes[@]}"; do
      z_image_tags+=("${z_hallmark}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ATTEST}${z_platform_suffixes[$z_idx]}")
    done
  fi

  # About, vouch, diags, and pouch tags use full hallmark
  local -r z_about_tag="${z_hallmark}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ABOUT}"
  local -r z_vouch_tag="${z_hallmark}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_VOUCH}"
  local -r z_diags_tag="${z_hallmark}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_DIAGS}"
  local -r z_pouch_tag="${z_hallmark}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_POUCH}"

  buc_step "Verifying ark existence"

  # Check all image tags
  local z_existing_image_tags=()
  local z_img_tag=""
  local z_img_check_idx=0
  for z_img_tag in "${z_image_tags[@]}"; do
    local z_img_status_file="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}image_${z_img_check_idx}_status.txt"
    local z_img_response_file="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}image_${z_img_check_idx}_response.json"

    curl --head -s                                     \
      --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
      --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"           \
      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"           \
      -H "Accept: ${ZRBFC_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}"     \
      -w "%{http_code}"                               \
      -o "${z_img_response_file}"                     \
      "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}${RBRV_SIGIL}/manifests/${z_img_tag}" \
      > "${z_img_status_file}" || buc_die "HEAD request failed for image tag: ${z_img_tag}"

    local z_img_http_code
    z_img_http_code=$(<"${z_img_status_file}")
    test -n "${z_img_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for image tag: ${z_img_tag}"

    if test "${z_img_http_code}" = "200"; then
      z_existing_image_tags+=("${z_img_tag}")
    elif test "${z_img_http_code}" != "404"; then
      buc_die "Unexpected HTTP status ${z_img_http_code} for image tag: ${z_img_tag}"
    fi
    z_img_check_idx=$((z_img_check_idx + 1))
  done

  # Check if -about artifact exists
  local z_about_status_file="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}about_status.txt"
  local z_about_response_file="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}about_response.json"

  curl --head -s                                     \
    --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
    --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"           \
    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"           \
    -H "Accept: ${ZRBFC_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}"     \
    -w "%{http_code}"                               \
    -o "${z_about_response_file}"                   \
    "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}${RBRV_SIGIL}/manifests/${z_about_tag}" \
    > "${z_about_status_file}" || buc_die "HEAD request failed for -about artifact"

  local z_about_http_code
  z_about_http_code=$(<"${z_about_status_file}")
  test -n "${z_about_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for -about"

  local z_about_exists=false
  if test "${z_about_http_code}" = "200"; then
    z_about_exists=true
  elif test "${z_about_http_code}" != "404"; then
    buc_die "Unexpected HTTP status ${z_about_http_code} when checking -about artifact"
  fi

  # Check if -vouch artifact exists (optional — older arks won't have one)
  local z_vouch_status_file="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}vouch_status.txt"
  local z_vouch_response_file="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}vouch_response.json"

  curl --head -s                                     \
    --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
    --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"           \
    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"           \
    -H "Accept: ${ZRBFC_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}"     \
    -w "%{http_code}"                               \
    -o "${z_vouch_response_file}"                   \
    "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}${RBRV_SIGIL}/manifests/${z_vouch_tag}" \
    > "${z_vouch_status_file}" || buc_die "HEAD request failed for -vouch artifact"

  local z_vouch_http_code
  z_vouch_http_code=$(<"${z_vouch_status_file}")
  test -n "${z_vouch_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for -vouch"

  local z_vouch_exists=false
  if test "${z_vouch_http_code}" = "200"; then
    z_vouch_exists=true
  elif test "${z_vouch_http_code}" != "404"; then
    buc_die "Unexpected HTTP status ${z_vouch_http_code} when checking -vouch artifact"
  fi

  # Check if -diags artifact exists (optional — conjure-only, absent for bind/graft)
  local z_diags_status_file="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}diags_status.txt"
  local z_diags_response_file="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}diags_response.json"

  curl --head -s                                     \
    --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
    --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"           \
    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"           \
    -H "Accept: ${ZRBFC_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}"     \
    -w "%{http_code}"                               \
    -o "${z_diags_response_file}"                   \
    "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}${RBRV_SIGIL}/manifests/${z_diags_tag}" \
    > "${z_diags_status_file}" || buc_die "HEAD request failed for -diags artifact"

  local z_diags_http_code
  z_diags_http_code=$(<"${z_diags_status_file}")
  test -n "${z_diags_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for -diags"

  local z_diags_exists=false
  if test "${z_diags_http_code}" = "200"; then
    z_diags_exists=true
  elif test "${z_diags_http_code}" != "404"; then
    buc_die "Unexpected HTTP status ${z_diags_http_code} when checking -diags artifact"
  fi

  # Check if pouch artifact exists (optional — conjure/bind only, absent for graft)
  local z_pouch_status_file="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}pouch_status.txt"
  local z_pouch_response_file="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}pouch_response.json"

  curl --head -s                                     \
    --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
    --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"           \
    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"           \
    -H "Accept: ${ZRBFC_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}"     \
    -w "%{http_code}"                               \
    -o "${z_pouch_response_file}"                   \
    "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}${RBRV_SIGIL}/manifests/${z_pouch_tag}" \
    > "${z_pouch_status_file}" || buc_die "HEAD request failed for ${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_POUCH} artifact"

  local z_pouch_http_code
  z_pouch_http_code=$(<"${z_pouch_status_file}")
  test -n "${z_pouch_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for ${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_POUCH}"

  local z_pouch_exists=false
  if test "${z_pouch_http_code}" = "200"; then
    z_pouch_exists=true
  elif test "${z_pouch_http_code}" != "404"; then
    buc_die "Unexpected HTTP status ${z_pouch_http_code} when checking ${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_POUCH} artifact"
  fi

  # Evaluate ark state
  if test "${#z_existing_image_tags[@]}" -eq 0 && test "${z_about_exists}" = "false"; then
    buc_die "Hallmark not found: no image tags and no -about exists for ${RBRV_SIGIL}/${z_hallmark}"
  fi

  if test "${#z_existing_image_tags[@]}" -gt 0 && test "${z_about_exists}" = "false"; then
    buc_warn "Orphaned artifact detected: image tags exist but -about is missing"
  elif test "${#z_existing_image_tags[@]}" -eq 0 && test "${z_about_exists}" = "true"; then
    buc_warn "Orphaned artifact detected: -about exists but no image tags found"
  fi

  # Confirm abjuration unless --force
  if test "${z_skip_confirm}" = "false"; then
    local z_confirm_msg="Will abjure ark ${RBRV_SIGIL}/${z_hallmark}:"
    if (( ${#z_existing_image_tags[@]} )); then
      for z_img_tag in "${z_existing_image_tags[@]}"; do
        z_confirm_msg="${z_confirm_msg}\n  - ${RBRV_SIGIL}:${z_img_tag}"
      done
    fi
    if test "${z_about_exists}" = "true"; then
      z_confirm_msg="${z_confirm_msg}\n  - ${RBRV_SIGIL}:${z_about_tag}"
    fi
    if test "${z_vouch_exists}" = "true"; then
      z_confirm_msg="${z_confirm_msg}\n  - ${RBRV_SIGIL}:${z_vouch_tag}"
    fi
    if test "${z_diags_exists}" = "true"; then
      z_confirm_msg="${z_confirm_msg}\n  - ${RBRV_SIGIL}:${z_diags_tag}"
    fi
    if test "${z_pouch_exists}" = "true"; then
      z_confirm_msg="${z_confirm_msg}\n  - ${RBRV_SIGIL}:${z_pouch_tag}"
    fi
    buc_require "${z_confirm_msg}" "yes"
  fi

  # Delete all existing image tags
  if (( ${#z_existing_image_tags[@]} )); then
    local z_img_del_idx=0
    for z_img_tag in "${z_existing_image_tags[@]}"; do
      buc_step "Deleting image tag: ${z_img_tag}"

      local z_delete_img_status="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}delete_image_${z_img_del_idx}_status.txt"
      local z_delete_img_response="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}delete_image_${z_img_del_idx}_response.json"

      curl -X DELETE -s                                   \
        --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
        --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"             \
        -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"             \
        -w "%{http_code}"                                 \
        -o "${z_delete_img_response}"                     \
        "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}${RBRV_SIGIL}/manifests/${z_img_tag}" \
        > "${z_delete_img_status}" || buc_die "DELETE request failed for image tag: ${z_img_tag}"

      local z_delete_img_code
      z_delete_img_code=$(<"${z_delete_img_status}")
      test -n "${z_delete_img_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for image tag delete: ${z_img_tag}"

      if test "${z_delete_img_code}" != "202" && test "${z_delete_img_code}" != "204"; then
        local z_body="empty"
        if test -f "${z_delete_img_response}"; then z_body=$(<"${z_delete_img_response}"); fi
        buc_warn "Response body: ${z_body}"
        buc_die "Failed to delete image tag ${z_img_tag} (HTTP ${z_delete_img_code})"
      fi

      buc_info "Deleted: ${RBRV_SIGIL}:${z_img_tag}"
      z_img_del_idx=$((z_img_del_idx + 1))
    done
  fi

  # Delete -about artifact if exists
  if test "${z_about_exists}" = "true"; then
    buc_step "Deleting -about artifact"

    local z_delete_about_status="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}delete_about_status.txt"
    local z_delete_about_response="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}delete_about_response.json"

    curl -X DELETE -s                                   \
      --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
      --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"             \
      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"             \
      -w "%{http_code}"                                 \
      -o "${z_delete_about_response}"                   \
      "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}${RBRV_SIGIL}/manifests/${z_about_tag}" \
      > "${z_delete_about_status}" || buc_die "DELETE request failed for -about"

    local z_delete_about_code
    z_delete_about_code=$(<"${z_delete_about_status}")
    test -n "${z_delete_about_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for -about delete"

    if test "${z_delete_about_code}" != "202" && test "${z_delete_about_code}" != "204"; then
      local z_body="empty"
      if test -f "${z_delete_about_response}"; then z_body=$(<"${z_delete_about_response}"); fi
      buc_warn "Response body: ${z_body}"
      buc_die "Failed to delete -about artifact (HTTP ${z_delete_about_code})"
    fi

    buc_info "Deleted: ${RBRV_SIGIL}:${z_about_tag}"
  fi

  # Delete -vouch artifact if exists (optional — older arks won't have one)
  if test "${z_vouch_exists}" = "true"; then
    buc_step "Deleting -vouch artifact"

    local z_delete_vouch_status="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}delete_vouch_status.txt"
    local z_delete_vouch_response="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}delete_vouch_response.json"

    curl -X DELETE -s                                   \
      --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
      --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"             \
      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"             \
      -w "%{http_code}"                                 \
      -o "${z_delete_vouch_response}"                   \
      "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}${RBRV_SIGIL}/manifests/${z_vouch_tag}" \
      > "${z_delete_vouch_status}" || buc_die "DELETE request failed for -vouch"

    local z_delete_vouch_code
    z_delete_vouch_code=$(<"${z_delete_vouch_status}")
    test -n "${z_delete_vouch_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for -vouch delete"

    if test "${z_delete_vouch_code}" != "202" && test "${z_delete_vouch_code}" != "204"; then
      local z_body="empty"
      if test -f "${z_delete_vouch_response}"; then z_body=$(<"${z_delete_vouch_response}"); fi
      buc_warn "Response body: ${z_body}"
      buc_die "Failed to delete -vouch artifact (HTTP ${z_delete_vouch_code})"
    fi

    buc_info "Deleted: ${RBRV_SIGIL}:${z_vouch_tag}"
  fi

  # Delete -diags artifact if exists (optional — conjure-only)
  if test "${z_diags_exists}" = "true"; then
    buc_step "Deleting -diags artifact"

    local z_delete_diags_status="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}delete_diags_status.txt"
    local z_delete_diags_response="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}delete_diags_response.json"

    curl -X DELETE -s                                   \
      --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
      --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"             \
      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"             \
      -w "%{http_code}"                                 \
      -o "${z_delete_diags_response}"                   \
      "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}${RBRV_SIGIL}/manifests/${z_diags_tag}" \
      > "${z_delete_diags_status}" || buc_die "DELETE request failed for -diags"

    local z_delete_diags_code
    z_delete_diags_code=$(<"${z_delete_diags_status}")
    test -n "${z_delete_diags_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for -diags delete"

    if test "${z_delete_diags_code}" != "202" && test "${z_delete_diags_code}" != "204"; then
      local z_body="empty"
      if test -f "${z_delete_diags_response}"; then z_body=$(<"${z_delete_diags_response}"); fi
      buc_warn "Response body: ${z_body}"
      buc_die "Failed to delete -diags artifact (HTTP ${z_delete_diags_code})"
    fi

    buc_info "Deleted: ${RBRV_SIGIL}:${z_diags_tag}"
  fi

  # Delete pouch artifact if exists (optional — conjure/bind only)
  if test "${z_pouch_exists}" = "true"; then
    buc_step "Deleting ${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_POUCH} artifact"

    local z_delete_pouch_status="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}delete_pouch_status.txt"
    local z_delete_pouch_response="${ZRBFL_DELETE_PREFIX}delete_pouch_response.json"

    curl -X DELETE -s                                   \
      --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
      --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"             \
      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"             \
      -w "%{http_code}"                                 \
      -o "${z_delete_pouch_response}"                   \
      "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}${RBRV_SIGIL}/manifests/${z_pouch_tag}" \
      > "${z_delete_pouch_status}" || buc_die "DELETE request failed for ${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_POUCH}"

    local z_delete_pouch_code
    z_delete_pouch_code=$(<"${z_delete_pouch_status}")
    test -n "${z_delete_pouch_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for ${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_POUCH} delete"

    if test "${z_delete_pouch_code}" != "202" && test "${z_delete_pouch_code}" != "204"; then
      local z_body="empty"
      if test -f "${z_delete_pouch_response}"; then z_body=$(<"${z_delete_pouch_response}"); fi
      buc_warn "Response body: ${z_body}"
      buc_die "Failed to delete ${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_POUCH} artifact (HTTP ${z_delete_pouch_code})"
    fi

    buc_info "Deleted: ${RBRV_SIGIL}:${z_pouch_tag}"
  fi

  # Display results
  echo ""
  buc_success "Hallmark abjured: ${RBRV_SIGIL}/${z_hallmark}"
  if (( ${#z_existing_image_tags[@]} )); then
    for z_img_tag in "${z_existing_image_tags[@]}"; do
      echo "  - ${RBRV_SIGIL}:${z_img_tag} deleted"
    done
  fi
  if test "${z_about_exists}" = "true"; then
    echo "  - ${RBRV_SIGIL}:${z_about_tag} deleted"
  fi
  if test "${z_vouch_exists}" = "true"; then
    echo "  - ${RBRV_SIGIL}:${z_vouch_tag} deleted"
  fi
  if test "${z_diags_exists}" = "true"; then
    echo "  - ${RBRV_SIGIL}:${z_diags_tag} deleted"
  fi
  if test "${z_pouch_exists}" = "true"; then
    echo "  - ${RBRV_SIGIL}:${z_pouch_tag} deleted"
  fi
}

rbfl_tally() {
  zrbfl_sentinel

  buc_doc_brief "List hallmarks across all vessels with health status"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  buc_step "Enumerating vessels"
  local z_sigils
  z_sigils=$(rbrv_list_capture) || buc_die "No vessels found"

  buc_step "Authenticating as Retriever"
  test -f "${RBDC_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}" || buc_die "Retriever credential not found: ${RBDC_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}"
  local z_token
  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to get OAuth token"

  local z_any_pending=0
  local z_any_incomplete=0

  local z_sigil=""
  for z_sigil in ${z_sigils}; do

    buc_debug "Querying GAR tags for ${z_sigil}"
    local z_tags_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfl_dc_${z_sigil}_tags.json"
    local z_stderr_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfl_dc_${z_sigil}_stderr.txt"
    curl -sL \
      --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
      --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}" \
      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
      "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}${z_sigil}/tags/list" \
      > "${z_tags_file}" 2>"${z_stderr_file}" \
      || buc_die "Failed to fetch tags for ${z_sigil} — see ${z_stderr_file}"

    if jq -e '.errors' "${z_tags_file}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
      local z_err
      jq -r '.errors[0].message // "Unknown error"' "${z_tags_file}" > "${ZRBFC_SCRATCH_FILE}" \
        || buc_die "Failed to extract error message from registry response for ${z_sigil}"
      z_err=$(<"${ZRBFC_SCRATCH_FILE}")
      buc_die "Registry API error for ${z_sigil}: ${z_err}"
    fi

    # Extract tags and identify full hallmarks
    local z_all_tags_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfl_dc_${z_sigil}_all_tags.txt"
    jq -r '.tags[]? // empty' "${z_tags_file}" > "${z_all_tags_file}" \
      || buc_die "Failed to extract tags for ${z_sigil}"

    local z_consec_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfl_dc_${z_sigil}_hallmarks.txt"
    local z_tag_data_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfl_dc_${z_sigil}_tag_data.txt"
    : > "${z_consec_file}"
    : > "${z_tag_data_file}"

    while IFS= read -r z_tag || test -n "${z_tag}"; do
      local z_consec=""
      if [[ "${z_tag}" =~ ^([cbg][0-9]{12}-r[0-9]{12}) ]]; then
        z_consec="${BASH_REMATCH[1]}"
      else
        continue
      fi

      case "${z_tag}" in
        *"${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ATTEST}"-*)
          # Durable -attest-{arch} tags — provenance-carrying artifacts
          local z_attest_suffix="${z_tag#*"${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ATTEST}"}"
          echo "${z_consec}|attest|${z_attest_suffix#-}" >> "${z_tag_data_file}"
          echo "${z_consec}" >> "${z_consec_file}"
          ;;
        *"${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}")
          echo "${z_consec}|image|consumer" >> "${z_tag_data_file}"
          echo "${z_consec}" >> "${z_consec_file}"
          ;;
        *"${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_VOUCH}")
          echo "${z_consec}|vouch|" >> "${z_tag_data_file}"
          echo "${z_consec}" >> "${z_consec_file}"
          ;;
        *"${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ABOUT}")
          echo "${z_consec}|about|" >> "${z_tag_data_file}"
          echo "${z_consec}" >> "${z_consec_file}"
          ;;
        *"${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_DIAGS}")
          echo "${z_consec}|diags|" >> "${z_tag_data_file}"
          echo "${z_consec}" >> "${z_consec_file}"
          ;;
        *"${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_POUCH}")
          echo "${z_consec}|pouch|" >> "${z_tag_data_file}"
          echo "${z_consec}" >> "${z_consec_file}"
          ;;
      esac
    done < "${z_all_tags_file}"

    local z_unique_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfl_dc_${z_sigil}_unique.txt"
    sort -ur "${z_consec_file}" > "${z_unique_file}" \
      || buc_die "Failed to sort hallmarks for ${z_sigil}"

    if ! test -s "${z_unique_file}"; then
      buc_debug "No hallmarks found for ${z_sigil}"
      continue
    fi

    # Display per-vessel table with health states
    printf "\nVessel: %s\n" "${z_sigil}"
    printf "  %-42s %-30s %-10s\n" "Hallmark" "Platforms" "Health"

    while IFS= read -r z_hallmark || test -n "${z_hallmark}"; do
      local z_consec_platforms=""
      local z_has_about="no"
      local z_has_vouch="no"
      local z_has_image="no"

      while IFS='|' read -r z_c z_type z_detail; do
        test "${z_c}" = "${z_hallmark}" || continue
        if test "${z_type}" = "image"; then
          z_has_image="yes"
        elif test "${z_type}" = "attest"; then
          z_has_image="yes"
          if test -n "${z_consec_platforms}"; then
            z_consec_platforms="${z_consec_platforms},${z_detail}"
          else
            z_consec_platforms="${z_detail}"
          fi
        elif test "${z_type}" = "about"; then
          z_has_about="yes"
        elif test "${z_type}" = "vouch"; then
          z_has_vouch="yes"
        fi
      done < "${z_tag_data_file}"

      local z_plat_display="${z_consec_platforms:-single}"
      local z_health=""
      if test "${z_has_about}" = "yes" && test "${z_has_vouch}" = "yes"; then
        z_health="vouched"
      elif test "${z_has_about}" = "yes" && test "${z_has_vouch}" = "no"; then
        z_health="pending"
        z_any_pending=1
      elif test "${z_has_image}" = "yes" && test "${z_has_about}" = "no"; then
        z_health="incomplete"
        z_any_incomplete=1
      fi

      printf "  %-42s %-30s %-10s\n" "${z_hallmark}" "${z_plat_display}" "${z_health}"

      # Write per-hallmark fact file for test observability
      test -n "${z_hallmark}" || buc_die "Empty hallmark in unique file for ${z_sigil}"
      buf_write_fact "${z_sigil}${RBCC_FACT_CONSEC_INFIX}${z_hallmark}" "${z_sigil}"
    done < "${z_unique_file}"

  done

  echo ""

  # Tabtarget recommendations
  if test "${z_any_pending}" = "1"; then
    buc_step "Pending hallmarks can be vouched:"
    buc_tabtarget "${RBZ_VOUCH_HALLMARKS}"
  fi
  if test "${z_any_incomplete}" = "1"; then
    buc_step "Incomplete hallmarks should be abjured and re-conjured:"
    buc_tabtarget "${RBZ_ABJURE_HALLMARK}"
  fi

  buc_success "Hallmark check complete"
}

rbfl_rekon() {
  zrbfl_sentinel

  local z_moniker="${1:-}"

  buc_doc_brief "List all tags for a vessel package in the registry"
  buc_doc_param "moniker" "Vessel moniker (e.g., rbev-sentry-deb-tether)"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  if test -z "${z_moniker}"; then
    local z_sigils
    z_sigils=$(rbrv_list_capture 2>/dev/null) || true
    buc_warn "Vessel moniker parameter required"
    if test -n "${z_sigils}"; then
      buc_bare "  Available vessels:"
      local z_s=""
      for z_s in ${z_sigils}; do
        buc_bare "    ${z_s}"
      done
    fi
    buc_die "Usage: rbw-ir <vessel-moniker>"
  fi

  buc_step "Authenticating as Director"
  local z_token
  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to get OAuth token"

  buc_step "Fetching tags for ${z_moniker}"
  local z_tags_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfl_rekon_tags.json"
  local z_stderr_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfl_rekon_stderr.txt"
  curl -sL \
    --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
    --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}" \
    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
    "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}${z_moniker}/tags/list" \
    > "${z_tags_file}" 2>"${z_stderr_file}" \
    || buc_die "Failed to fetch tags for ${z_moniker} — see ${z_stderr_file}"

  if jq -e '.errors' "${z_tags_file}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    local z_err
    jq -r '.errors[0].message // "Unknown error"' "${z_tags_file}" > "${ZRBFC_SCRATCH_FILE}" \
      || buc_die "Failed to extract error message from registry response"
    z_err=$(<"${ZRBFC_SCRATCH_FILE}")
    buc_die "Registry API error for ${z_moniker}: ${z_err}"
  fi

  local z_all_tags_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfl_rekon_all_tags.txt"
  jq -r '.tags[]? // empty' "${z_tags_file}" > "${z_all_tags_file}" \
    || buc_die "Failed to extract tags"

  local z_count
  z_count=$(wc -l < "${z_all_tags_file}" | tr -d ' ')

  printf "\nVessel: %s  (%s tags)\n\n" "${z_moniker}" "${z_count}"
  if test -s "${z_all_tags_file}"; then
    sort "${z_all_tags_file}"
  else
    echo "  (no tags)"
  fi

  buc_success "Rekon complete"
}

#!/bin/bash
#
# Copyright 2025 Scale Invariant, Inc.
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at
#
#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
#
# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.
#
# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
#
# Recipe Bottle GAR Layout - Implementation
#
# Kindle constants for GAR categorical-namespace path construction.
# Callers interpolate the three root constants with hallmark/date/anchor and
# basename literals at the call site — no subshell, no function call overhead.
#
# Shape:
#   "${z_gar_base}/${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/<hallmark>/<basename>:<hallmark>"
#   "${z_gar_base}/${RBGL_RELIQUARIES_ROOT}/<date>/<tool>:<date>"
#   "${z_gar_base}/${RBGL_ENSHRINES_ROOT}/<anchor>:<anchor>"

set -euo pipefail

# Multiple inclusion detection
test -z "${ZRBGL_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgl multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
ZRBGL_SOURCED=1

######################################################################
# Internal Functions (zrbgl_*)

zrbgl_kindle() {
  test -z "${ZRBGL_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgl already kindled"

  # Category constants come from rbgc; cloud prefix comes from rbrr.
  zrbgc_sentinel
  test -n "${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX+x}" \
    || buc_die "RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX must be defined before rbgl kindle"

  # Root segments — cloud-prefix + category. Callers append '/<id>/<basename>:<tag>'.
  readonly RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT="${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}${RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_HALLMARKS}"
  readonly RBGL_RELIQUARIES_ROOT="${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}${RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_RELIQUARIES}"
  readonly RBGL_ENSHRINES_ROOT="${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}${RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_ENSHRINES}"

  readonly ZRBGL_KINDLED=1
}

zrbgl_sentinel() {
  test "${ZRBGL_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbgl not kindled - call zrbgl_kindle first"
}

# eof
